description: Designed for everyday use, this backpack from reebok is perfect for carrying all your stuff in style. The bag comes with enough compartments to hold your essentials and even a laptop. Roomy and comfortable, it makes for a perfect partner on weekend getaways.Height: 17"Width: 13" Made of nylon with complete protective lining for easy cleaning and durability Branded zippers and sliders Big roomy main compartment with seperate padded laptop chamber that has a velcro strap closure Front utility compartment with key loop and pouches Front utility pocket to hold your essentials Graphic dot design on the facade with reebok brand name Mesh pockets on the sides to carry a sipper, etc. Haul loop for easy handling Padding on the back and straps for extra comfort, ventillation and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Adjustable straps for an ergonomic Fit and better support CareHand washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not ironDo not wringDrip dry
